title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
summary: Join our compassionate care team as a Certified Nursing Assistant. You will provide essential hands-on support to elderly clients in their homes, helping them maintain independence and dignity while delivering the highest standard of personal care.
responsibilities: Assist clients with activities of daily living (ADLs) including bathing, dressing, grooming, and toileting
Monitor and record vital signs, reporting changes in client condition to the supervising nurse
Provide companionship and emotional support to clients and their families
Assist with light meal preparation and ensure proper nutrition and hydration
Accompany clients to medical appointments and community activities
Maintain a clean, safe, and comfortable living environment
Document care provided accurately and in a timely manner
requirements: Minimum 1 year of experience in home care, long-term care, or a clinical setting preferred
Genuine passion for caring for the elderly, especially those with dementia or Alzheimer's
Reliable transportation and a valid driver's license
Ability to pass a background check and drug screening
Strong communication skills and a team-oriented mindset
CPR/First Aid certification (or willingness to obtain)
benefits: Flexible scheduling to fit your lifestyle

title: Home Health Aide (HHA)
summary: We are looking for dedicated Home Health Aides who are committed to enriching the lives of our clients. In this role you will provide personalized care and assistance to seniors in the comfort of their own homes, making a meaningful difference every single day.
responsibilities: Assist clients with personal hygiene, grooming, and mobility as directed by the care plan
Support clients with prescribed exercises and physical therapy routines
Prepare nutritious meals and assist with feeding when necessary
Perform light housekeeping duties including laundry and tidying living spaces
Provide medication reminders and observe for side effects
Offer companionship and engage clients in stimulating activities
Communicate changes in client health or behavior to the care coordinator promptly
requirements: Experience working with seniors, especially those with dementia or chronic conditions, preferred
Reliable transportation and a valid driver's license
Ability to pass a background check and drug screening
Ability to lift and assist clients safely (up to 50 lbs with proper technique)
Basic English communication skills (written and verbal)
benefits: Flexible scheduling to fit your lifestyle
